analysis:
Local analysis only. No audio was sent to an AI provider.
Analyzer: local_audio_analysis_v2 (local-analysis-v2.0.0+essentia-2.1-beta6-dev); advanced local analysis available.
Layer 1 local facts: duration, sample rate, bitrate, loudness, silence, tempo estimate, beat grid, onset density, spectral descriptors, and key estimate.
Layer 2 heuristic guesses: hook/entry/exit/reset/finale/chorus-like candidates are guesses with confidence and warnings.
Layer 3 scoring/ranking: medley usefulness scores are local heuristics, not musical facts.
Duration: 239.4s
Technical: 48000 Hz, 1536 kbps
Volume: mean -16 dB, max -0.2 dB
Estimated BPM: 129 (beat confidence 100%)
Estimated key: F major (confidence 39%; estimate only)
Spectral: centroid 1863 Hz, rolloff 3992 Hz, brightness 40%, flux 3%
Onsets: 74 detected, 33 strong, density 18.549/min
Beat-snapped candidate sections: 0.0-23.9s intro_candidate (76%), 0.0-5.6s breakdown_or_reset_candidate (76%), 2.0-13.9s chorus_like_candidate (92%), 13.9-26.1s chorus_like_candidate (82%), 49.8-62.0s chorus_like_candidate (90%), 63.9-75.8s chorus_like_candidate (90%), 123.7-135.7s chorus_like_candidate (90%), 127.5-139.8s chorus_like_candidate (90%)
Silence regions: 0.0-1.5s, 79.1-79.4s, 171.5-172.3s, 238.2-238.6s, 238.8-239.2s
Top hook candidates: b555f3f2-d87e-4405-b295-7a1f3dbfc3f7_section_01 (76%, confidence 94%), b555f3f2-d87e-4405-b295-7a1f3dbfc3f7_section_02 (73%, confidence 93%), b555f3f2-d87e-4405-b295-7a1f3dbfc3f7_section_03 (51%, confidence 90%)
